title: Better Combat Experience
body:
This mod can greatly enhance your combat experience.
Now:
- Empty left click will not reset attack cooldown;
- Dig the block will not reset attack cooldown;
- When you press and hold the left onto a mob, it will automatically attack when attack recharge meter is full.Sweep every strike!
- Integrated with SwingThroughGrass.
If you are nostalgic for the combat mechanism before 1.9, but feel that it is not suitable for higher version environments, then I highly recommend using this mod.
[MixinBooter](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixinbooter) is required.
